# setAllowsDroppingOnItems(_:)

**Instance Method**

Specifies whether the user can drop on items.

## Declaration

```swift
func setAllowsDroppingOnItems(_ flag: Bool)
```

## Parameters

- **flag**: [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the user is able to drop on items, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Discussion

The default is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Supporting Drag and Drop

- **setDraggingDestinationDelegate(_:)**: Sets the dragging destination delegate of the receiver.
- **draggingDestinationDelegate()**: Returns the dragging destination delegate of the receiver.
- **setDrop(_:dropOperation:)**: Allows the class to retarget the drop action.
- **indexAtLocationOfDroppedItem()**: Returns the index of the cell where the drop operation occurred.
- **allowsDroppingOnItems()**: Returns whether the user can drop on items.
- **dropOperation()**: Returns the current drop operation.
